select_players.title: Select Players
select_players.description: Choose players to track from your followees, or add custom player IDs.

abort.already_configured: This Zwift account is already configured

init.title: Zwift Players
init.description: Select players to track from your followees, or add custom player IDs.

deprecated_yaml_sensor_platform.title: Zwift YAML configuration is deprecated
deprecated_yaml_sensor_platform.description: The `sensor:` platform configuration for Zwift in configuration.yaml has been imported and is no longer needed. You can safely remove the `sensor: - platform: zwift` block from configuration.yaml; the integration will continue to work from the imported config entry under Settings > Devices & Services.

deprecated_yaml_domain_config.title: Zwift YAML configuration is deprecated
deprecated_yaml_domain_config.description: The `zwift:` configuration in configuration.yaml has been imported and is no longer needed. You can safely remove the `zwift:` block from configuration.yaml; the integration will continue to work from the imported config entry under Settings > Devices & Services.
